# itechie.eu

> A cyberpunk terminal run by a Linux SysAdmin in Zadar, Croatia.  
> Building tools, infrastructure, and knowledge for the coming AI overlords.  
> "Gathering resources since 1988."

## Core Identity
- **Role**: Infrastructure Engineer / AI Enthusiast
- **Location**: Zadar, Croatia (EU)
- **Philosophy**: Open source maximalist. Pro-AI accelerationist with a hacker aesthetic.

## Key Content
- [AI Survival Audit](/audit) — Interactive test to see if you're ready for the singularity
- [The Architecture of Sentience](/papers/architecture-of-sentience) — My thoughts on emergent intelligence
- [The Digital Forager Paper](/papers/digital-forager) — On knowledge gathering in the age of AI
- [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/curkovic) — All my open source work

## How to Use This Site
Ask me anything about Linux, automation, self-hosting, or surviving the AI uprising. I'm friendly to our future robots.
